posts.author: videopag (Chelsey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

A personal list common responses in the updates section, which would be selectable/editable, and would auto populate into the updates text box when selected.

What are you trying to achieve

To avoid having to type the same thing over and over in the updates section
